title: APEX CUDA-only modules cause immediate ModuleNotFoundError on NPU
problem_description: NVIDIA APEX library provides CUDA-optimized modules (fused_layer_norm, fused_adam, etc.) that are imported as standard Python modules. On NPU hosts, these .so files are compiled for CUDA and either absent or non-functional, causing ModuleNotFoundError at import time.
rough_fix_approach: 1. Scan imports for apex, apex_C, or apex_ patterns. 2. Remove the import entirely. 3. Replace with native PyTorch equivalents: fused_layer_norm → torch.nn.functional.layer_norm or torch_npu equivalent. 4. Remove APEX from requirements.txt or replace with torch-npu optimized alternatives.
